circular: Notice No. B-10/2026/01 dated 17-05-2026: III & IV B.Tech. I Semester classes for AY 2026-27 commence from 06-07-2026. Tuition Fee (MQ, NRTF, SPOT category) must be paid before class commencement. Early Bird Offer: Pay before 20-06-2026 and avail 10% discount. Payment portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in. Fund transfer details to be submitted at college office.
notice: Notice No. B-10/2026/01 dated 17-05-2026: III & IV B.Tech. I Semester classes for AY 2026-27 commence from 06-07-2026. Tuition Fee (MQ, NRTF, SPOT category) must be paid before class commencement. Early Bird Offer: Pay before 20-06-2026 and avail 10% discount. Payment portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in. Fund transfer details to be submitted at college office.
announcement: Latest Announcement (17-05-2026): III & IV B.Tech I Semester classes for AY 2026-27 start from 06-07-2026. Tuition fee must be paid before commencement. Early Bird: Pay before 20-06-2026 for 10% discount. Pay at https://portal.nbkrsac.in
fee: Tuition Fee Notice (B-10/2026/01): III & IV B.Tech students (MQ, NRTF, SPOT category) must pay tuition fee in full before 06-07-2026 (class commencement date). Early Bird Offer: Pay before 20-06-2026 to get 10% discount. Payment must be done through https://portal.nbkrsac.in. Submit fund transfer details at the college office and collect receipts.
tuition fee: Tuition Fee for III & IV B.Tech (AY 2026-27): Pay before 06-07-2026. Early Bird Offer: Pay before 20-06-2026 and get 10% discount. Applicable to MQ, NRTF, SPOT category students. Payment portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in
early bird: Early Bird Offer for Tuition Fee Payment: Pay your tuition fee before 20-06-2026 and avail a 10% discount. Applicable to III & IV B.Tech students (MQ, NRTF, SPOT category) for AY 2026-27. Payment portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in
class commencement: III & IV B.Tech I Semester classes for Academic Year 2026-27 commence from 06-07-2026 as per Notice No. B-10/2026/01 dated 17-05-2026 issued by the Principal, NBKR Institute of Science & Technology.
enrolment: Enrolment process for III & IV B.Tech I Semester AY 2026-27: Complete tuition fee payment and enrolment before 06-07-2026 (class commencement). Pay via https://portal.nbkrsac.in and submit fund transfer details at the college office.
payment portal: NBKR Fee Payment Portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in. Students must log in individually to pay tuition fees. After payment, fund transfer details must be submitted at the college office and receipts collected.
mq nrtf spot: MQ, NRTF, and SPOT category students must pay tuition fee in full before the commencement of III & IV B.Tech I Semester classes (06-07-2026). Early Bird: Pay before 20-06-2026 for 10% discount. Portal: https://portal.nbkrsac.in
hostel: Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls at NBKR Institute. Clean dining halls, Wi-Fi, recreation rooms, and 24/7 security are provided. Contact the hostel warden's office for booking and fee details.
admission: Admissions at NBKR Institute are open from June to August for B.Tech programs. Candidates must qualify through AP EAPCET (EAMCET) counselling or spot admission for MQ seats. Check the admission portal for circulars.
admissions: Admissions at NBKR Institute are open from June to August for B.Tech programs. Candidates must qualify through AP EAPCET (EAMCET) counselling or spot admission for MQ seats. Check the admission portal for circulars.
courses: NBKR Institute offers undergraduate B.Tech programs in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science (AI & DS), Computer Science & Engineering (CSE), Information Technology (IT), Electronics & Communication (ECE), Electrical & Electronics (EEE), Civil Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering.
library: The central library at NBKR Institute is open from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on weekdays and 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM on weekends. It holds a vast collection of text books, reference volumes, journals, and provides e-journal intranet access.
placement: NBKR Institute has a dedicated training & placement cell. Placement rate is 85%+ in top MNCs including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, and Accenture, with regular training in soft skills and technical skills.
